_comment: Config-driven tool selection for run_eval_pipeline.py. Each KEY maps to one or more Steps in build_steps(). 'default' decides whether the tool's step(s) are generated when no CLI override is given; 'branch' is informational (sequence vs structure); 'description' shows in --list-tools. CLI flags --only/--include/--exclude/--self_consistency override these defaults (see the module docstring). To register a NEW tool: add one entry here (key + default/branch/description) and tag its Step(s) with tool="<key>" in build_steps -- nothing else changes. If a key is omitted from this file it falls back to the built-in DEFAULT_TOOLS table baked into the script, so the pipeline still runs if the JSON is missing or stale.

motif_pair.description: Sequence distance between the two metal-binding motifs.

maxid_self.description: Max pairwise sequence identity within the dataset.

mindist_self.description: Min ESM-embedding distance within the dataset (needs esm).

swissprot_search.description: DIAMOND search vs Swiss-Prot (gen-only; TPS/non-TPS hits).

maxid_gen_vs_train.description: Max sequence identity of each gen seq vs the train set.

mindist_gen_vs_train.description: Min ESM-embedding distance of gen vs train (needs esm).

motif_struct.description: Structural distance between the two metal-binding motifs.

radius_of_gyration.description: Radius of gyration / compactness over Ca atoms.

pocket_descriptors.description: Active-site pocket descriptors (fpocket volume/hydrophobicity/enclosure + P2Rank ligandability cross-check).

structural_identity.description: Foldseek structural identity to nearest known TPS (needs --known_structs_dir).

proteinmpnn.description: ProteinMPNN sequence-likelihood (NLL) of the design's own sequence given its fold.

global_confidence.description: Global fold confidence (pTM/iPTM) from the saved PAE npz (needs --pae_dir).

interdomain_pae.description: Mean/max inter-domain PAE between TPS domains (needs --pae_dir; EE domain ranges).

self_consistency.description: HEAVY scRMSD self-consistency (ProteinMPNN -> ESMFold refold -> RMSD). Opt-in.

plots.description: Aggregator: merges all enabled metrics into plots. Effectively always on unless explicitly excluded.
